holdings.infoBox: SBIO is an equity ETF with a total of 85 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alkermes stock at 4.75%, Kymera Therapeutics at 4.70%, Spyre Therapeutics at 4.40%, Mirum Pharmaceuticals at 3.94%, and CG Oncology at 3.27%.

overview.description: The ALPS Medical Breakthroughs ETF (SBIO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S-Network Medical Breakthroughs index. The fund tracks, a market-cap weighted index comprising US-listed biotech companies with one or more drugs currently in either Phase II or Phase III FDA clinical trials. SBIO was launched on Dec 31, 2014 and is issued by SS&C.
